creator: yinjieh@csie.nctu.edu.tw
text:
Dear Edwin,

  I approve this pr, please commit it.

Thanks!

On Mon, Jul 24, 2006 at 11:00:43PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/p5-Data-Bind,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/100790 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/100790
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
